top_signals.title: Ukraine brings the war to Moscow as huge blasts shake refinery
top_signals.summary: The attacks are part of a wider Ukrainian campaign to cripple the oil industry whose revenues finance Russia's ‌war effort.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Australian Beef Exports Face 55% China Tariff as Quota Reached
top_signals.summary: Australian beef exports to China will face an additional 55% tariff starting this weekend after hitting Beijing’s annual quota limit, which could impact trade flows and prompt producers to seek new markets for red meat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fidelity launches GENIUS-aligned money market fund for stablecoin issuers
top_signals.summary: The fund invests exclusively in eligible reserve assets permitted for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Rep. Steil introduces bill to block lawmakers from placing prediction markets bets on public policy issues
top_signals.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil introduced legislation aimed at preventing lawmakers and their families from profiting from bets on political outcomes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The vaccines and treatments being developed for Ebola outbreak
top_signals.summary: Scientists, pharmaceutical companies and funding bodies have been racing to develop new vaccines and treatments that can be swiftly and safely tested in humans.
